name: deepcore_reserve
description: Deep Restructuring (q.side_reserve slot 53, Deepcore SQ1 marquee) end-to-end: Nurse Rilka's rumor hub points at Kang (met_deepcore_nurse), Kang's ask starts the chain (deepcore_restructure_started), the Re-Verified Reserve Ledger board arms the turn-in (deepcore_ledger_seen), a SHORT-COUNT refusal proves the clear-with-0 page count (0 pages -> 'Not six yet', no state change), then 6x minecraft:paper -> turn_in pays face 900 via the skewed payout + Black Belt + deepcore_restructure_done, the debrief entry (prio 40) opens the wager_offer lane, and the 250 CD stake wager vs the Restructuring Officer (sq_deepcore_assessor, ace L35) runs via dev-bot autobattle: 'Stake logged' -> win line -> wager_sweetener. Epilogue re-reads both bodies at the vault: Roderick's beaten entry (prio 40, despawn_on_win false - the vault persists) and the board's FILED addendum (prio 20). Payout amounts are NOT exact-asserted (payout rate rides cd_instability 75-100%, sweetener rolls 25..100); re-runs accumulate CD and one Garchomp pair per run.
_probe_note: Deepcore quest-pack latches (nurse/Kang/board/assessor) are newer than the alpha.13 live sweep and their compiled placements ride the y=129 plaza height; nearby verified ambients sit at y=119-129, so ground-probe each tp site before the first live run.

steps.comment: -- preamble: close any leftover dialog from a prior scenario, then reset every tag this chain sets (idempotent re-runs) plus the turn-in items --
-- tp to the pit-head Center FIRST (latches spawn within 40b; no kills needed here - all four bodies persist, no latch reset), then daylight + battle prep --
-- stale-battle sweep + party reset: junk lv-5 parties stall TBCS battle init (verified live); empty all 6 slots, then two lv-100 Garchomp for attrition headroom (assessor ace is L35) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100

steps.comment_: cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment_: the 250 CD stake must never bounce off the broke-probe; balances are never exact-asserted in this scenario

steps.comment: -- beat 1: Nurse Rilka's rumor hub. say[] rotates 3 lines, so the screen assert targets the stable heal-button label; the Kang rumor button sets met_deepcore_nurse + announces --

steps.click: Anyone need a hand around here?

steps.wait_chat: Foreman Kang, if you can stand his grumbling

steps.comment: -- beat 2: Foreman Kang's ask (default entry, gated not_tag deepcore_restructure_started) --

steps.wait_chat: Six struck pages from the shredder bins by the Company field office

steps.comment: -- beat 3: the Re-Verified Reserve Ledger at the Company field office - read_button arms the turn-in stage (deepcore_ledger_seen) --
-- beat 4: SHORT-COUNT refusal. Back to Kang with ZERO pages: the turn_in entry (prio 30) must show, and the clear-with-0 count check must refuse without state change --

-- beat 5: the pages + turn-in. 6x vanilla paper (the Genji parallel - scrounged from the field-office bins in canon), then restructure_success: clears exactly 6, skewed payout receipt, RESERVE FRAUD FILED, Black Belt --

-- beat 6: the debrief (prio 40) + the dojo wager lane. The Officer button announces, then open_dialog swaps to wager_offer WITHOUT closing - the screen stays Dialog, so assert by the new entry's button --

steps.expect_screen_text: That Officer at the vault - is he still there?

steps.click: That Officer at the vault - is he still there?

steps.expect_screen_text: Take the wager - 250 CD on the line

steps.comment: -- beat 7: the wager. stake_assessor charges the 250 stake (broke-probe), fires the TBCS battle; the win chain is 500 CD + defeat tag + the Officer's win line + wager_sweetener --

steps.click: Take the wager - 250 CD on the line

steps.comment_: battle GUI replaces the dialog now that the dispatch is ANCHORED (2026-07-18) — close it and let the win-line wait pace the fight (wisps idiom)

steps.comment: -- beat 8: vault epilogue. Roderick persists (despawn_on_win false) and must show the beaten entry (prio 40); the board must show the FILED addendum (prio 20, say pair covered any-of) --

steps.comment_: the board stands 2b from the Officer - the player is already at the vault

expect_screen_text: ADDENDUM, filed over the verified count. Reserve reconciliation flagged for external review, per union petition. The Company thanks the Deepcore workforce for its verified confidence and regrets any adjustment to same.
The addendum is stamped VERIFIED twice, as if saying it harder makes the vein whole again.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: quest-done latches (deepcore_restructure_done, defeated_sq_deepcore_assessor) stay set BY DESIGN - re-runs reset them in the preamble; only the bot enrollment comes off --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
